title: Lead Instructional Designer at Teach For India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Teach For India
jsonLd.description:
Teach For India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Teach For India:
Teach For India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India!
